scripts.build: npm run generate:types && npm run build -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run build -w @teamgrid/cli && npm run build -w @teamgrid/mcp-server
scripts.check: npm run generate:types && npm run build -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run build -w @teamgrid/cli && npm run typecheck -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run typecheck -w @teamgrid/cli && npm run typecheck -w @teamgrid/mcp-server && biome check packages scripts/validate-release.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build -w @teamgrid/api-client && npm run build -w @teamgrid/cli && vitest run
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run pack:check
